CREATE TABLE test_map (key String, value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY key;
SELECT mapReverseSort(map('key2', 2, 'key3', 1, 'key1', 3)) AS sorted_map FROM test_map;
SELECT mapReverseSort((k, v) -> v, map('key2', 2, 'key3', 1, 'key1', 3)) AS sorted_map FROM test_map;
SELECT mapReverseSort((k, v) -> k, map('key1', 3, 'key2', 2)) AS sorted_map;
SELECT mapReverseSort((k, v) -> k, map('key2', 2, 'key3', 1)) AS sorted_map;
SELECT mapReverseSort((k, v) -> v + 1, map('key1', 3, 'key2', 2)) AS sorted_map;
SELECT (SELECT mapReverseSort((k, v) -> v, map('key2', 2, 'key3', 1, 'key1', 3)) FROM test_map) AS nested_sort;
SELECT mapReverseSort((k, v) -> v, map('key1', 5, 'key4', 3, 'key2', 8)) AS sorted_map_from_subquery WHERE 'key1' = ANY(SELECT key FROM test_map);
CREATE TABLE additional_map (key String, value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY key;
SELECT mapReverseSort((k, v) -> v + t.value, map('key5', 4, 'key6', 6)) AS combined_sorted_map FROM additional_map t;
SELECT mapReverseSort((k, v) -> k, map('key1', 3, 'key2', 2, 'key3', 1)) AS complex_sorted_map;
